title: Skandika Nordland 4 Tunnel Tent — 4 Person, 5000 mm
short_description: A spacious Skandika Nordland 4 tunnel tent for four people with 200 cm standing height, a sewn-in groundsheet and a 5000 mm water column.
long_description: The Skandika Nordland 4 is a spacious tunnel tent for up to four people. Its 200 cm clear height provides comfortable freedom of movement in the living area. A sewn-in groundsheet, weather-resistant breathable material and a 5000 mm water column provide protection in changing camping conditions. The sleeping cabin can be divided, while mosquito nets support ventilation and insect protection.
buying_angle: Suitable for families and small camping groups seeking a spacious four-person tent with standing height, a sewn-in floor and strong weather protection.
seo_title: Skandika Nordland 4 Tunnel Tent – 4 Person | Daily Deal Finder
meta_description: Skandika Nordland 4 four-person tunnel tent with 200 cm standing height, sewn-in groundsheet, dividable sleeping cabin and 5000 mm water column.
